data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario where the group size changes after booking, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this behavior is supported or tested. The linked use case describes a waitlist scenario but does not address the specific requirement of handling changes in group size post-booking. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as there is no evidence that the system can handle or report on changes in group size effectively.
gaps: No evidence of handling group size changes after booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
